data.title: CU Boulder partners with Brock USA to install next-gen turf at Folsom Field & Indoor Practice Facility. Boulder, CO. Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: Boulder, Colorado - On February 16, 2026, the University of Colorado Boulder, in collaboration with Brock USA, founded by alumni, introduced innovative shock pad and organic infill systems at Folsom Field and CU's Indoor Practice Facility. This partnership marks a significant campus development aimed at enhancing sustainability and player safety.

data.title: AI stocks are struggling; software stocks sliding as investors rotate to old economy. Sectors like energy, materials rallying as tech stocks wobble.
data.description: The bullish trajectory of AI, expected to revolutionize industries and justify high capital investments, is now experiencing a setback as software stocks decline and investors shift focus back to traditional sectors. Veteran strategist Ed Yardeni compared the situation to "AI speed skating on ice," emphasizing the rapid disruption within the technology sector. The rapid pace of obsolescence in AI hardware and large language models is causing concern among investors, leading to the sell-off of companies deemed at risk of displacement. Software stocks are particularly affected, with the previously dominant Magnificent Seven losing their lead. Consequently, there is a shift in investments towards energy, materials, and other sectors of the "real" economy. The iShares Expanded Tech-Software ETF has been the first casualty this year as the industry faces challenges.
